title: J&K Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Posts
post_name: Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor
short_info: Jammu and Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for banking jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.age_details: Zonal Security Officer: Max 62 years. FL Counsellor: Max 65 years.
age_limit.details: Zonal Security Officer: Maximum age limit is 62 years. FL Counsellor: Maximum age limit is 65 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline for Zonal Security Officer. Graduate with experience in Banking/related fields and knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture for FL Counsellor.
qualification.details: Zonal Security Officer: Graduate in any discipline preferably from a recognized University/ Institute. Minimum of three years of experience as Deputy Superintendent of Police or equivalent. FL Counsellor: Graduate with experience in Banking/ related fields and having sound knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture and allied activities. Should have requisite communication and team building skills and the knowledge of local language is essential. Working knowledge of Computers. Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge/skills of having conducted Financial Literacy Camps. Preference will be given to honourably retired J&K Bank Officer not below the rank of Senior Manager (i.e. Scale-III Cadre).

salary_details.pay_scale: Zonal Security Officer: Rs. 45,000/- Per Month. FL Counsellor: Rs. 22,000/- Per Month.

selection_process: Screening of applications based on qualification
experience and suitability. Interview/Interaction to assess knowledge
experience and skill for Zonal Security Officer. Personal interview to assess communication ability
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of J&K Bank to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
